title: Lead Instructional Designer at Schoolnet India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Schoolnet India
jsonLd.description:
Schoolnet India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!
